debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
x : C
⊢ ⨆ p ∈ D, p x = ⊤

proof:
by
  have h := D.sSup_eq_top
  rw [sSup_eq_iSup] at h
  simpa [h] using congr_arg (fun S => S x) h
